Student Enrollment Agreement

Status: Completed on February 10, 2025

Student Information

Name: Jorge Martinez

Student ID: 24768

Email: jmartinez@student.apus.edu

Program: Computer Science, B.S.

Agreement Terms

By signing this agreement, I acknowledge that:

  • I have read and understand the terms and conditions of enrollment
  • I agree to abide by all university policies and procedures
  • I understand my financial responsibilities as a student
  • I consent to receive electronic communications from the university
